name: Arthur Rubinstein
abstract: Arthur Rubinstein  OMRI (Polish: Artur Rubinstein; 28 January 1887 – 20 December 1982) was a Polish and American pianist. Widely regarded as one of the greatest pianists of his day, he received international acclaim for his interpretations of classical music compositions, particularly Chopin.

about_quotes.speaker: Rossano Sportiello
about_quotes.evidence: Those beautiful videos that you see now of Arthur Rubenstein and Vladimir Horowitz.
about_quotes.doc_title: Rossano Sportiello interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, October 2, 2015 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Teddy Wilson
about_quotes.evidence: if Arthur Rubenstein hadn't retired, you'd have to get a ticket three or four years in advance to hear him play the piano.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Locke
about_quotes.evidence: I read both of Rubinstein’s books and went to see him about five times.
about_quotes.doc_title: Eddie Locke interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York, NY, January 13, 2001
